description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a dense arrangement of mature trees, providing a sense of privacy and seclusion. The structure features a complex, multi-faceted roof with both gable and hip elements, and a prominent covered porch area at the front. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by darker accents on the window frames and doors. A paved driveway leads up to the entrance, flanked by landscaped greenery and shrubs. The backyard includes a curved swimming pool, visible from several angles, and additional patio space for outdoor activities. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces and offering views of the surrounding garden.
description: A single-story bungalow with a complex roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a landscaped yard with a swimming pool, surrounded by mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, and more trees, with less visibility of the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio, and back facade, with the roof and trees framing the scene.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the pool, patio, and a partial view of the driveway and porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on multiple facades
